description: Returns a region object by its ID, including ownership, production, and development data.

output.description: Region object with ownership, production bonuses, deposits, and development info.

fields.name: string — region name
fields.country: string — countryId of the current owner
fields.productionBonuses: object — production bonus values by resource type
fields.deposits: object — deposit type and amount info
fields.occupationStatus: object — occupation state if region is under occupation
fields.taxRate: number — current tax rate for the region

notes: A region may be occupied by a country different from its original owner; check occupationStatus for details.
